programs.name: 14-Day Trial Program
programs.description:
This program is great to use as a 2-week challenge or starter program when you want to attract new clients to your business. You can also use it as a free trial.

The program includes:
- 1 initial prep week filled with key information about the 2-week program
- 2 full weeks with training, exercises and cardio activities
- 1 additional week at the end of the trial program with additional automated messages for your clients

programs.name: 90 Day BOOTY challenge
programs.description:
The 90 Day Booty Challenge is comprised of 3 weekly workouts  and 3 progressions. Workout 1. ACTIVATION: This is one of the most important components to targeting any muscle group. The activation workout is meant to be done as the first workout of the week. This allows for targeted and balanced gluteus maximus, gluteus medius, and gluteus minimus activation. Workout 2. BUILD: The second workout of the week is meant to challenge and develop those GLUTES! This is where we will be building and shaping the glutes. Workout 3. BONUS HIIT: The last weekly workout is optional , and is a high intensity interval training circuit. It is meant to work up a sweat and speed is the name of the game. Set your timer and keep track of how many rounds you complete! Each week compete with your former self and aim to beat your score! 


Gym and home versions of each workout are specified in the workout details. Make sure to read the notes.

programs.name: Booty Program Special
programs.description:
The 90 Day Booty Challenge is comprised of 3 weekly workouts and 3 progressions. Workout 1. ACTIVATION: This is one of the most important components to targeting any muscle group. The activation workout is meant to be done as the first workout of the week. This allows for targeted and balanced gluteus maximus, gluteus medius, and gluteus minimus activation. Workout 2. BUILD: The second workout of the week is meant to challenge and develop those GLUTES! This is where we will be building and shaping the glutes. Workout 3. BONUS HIIT: The last weekly workout is optional , and is a high intensity interval training circuit. It is meant to work up a sweat and speed is the name of the game. Set your timer and keep track of how many rounds you complete! Each week compete with your former self and aim to beat your score! 


Gym and home versions of each workout are specified in the workout details. Make sure to read the notes.

programs.name: Compound Functional Movement progression
programs.description: This program is designed for quick, functional workout progressions that focus on compound movements. The compound movements are ideal for multi plane training and function activity.

programs.name: Fit MaMa
programs.description: Congrats on your BABY!!!!!!! This is such a magical time in your life, and your body's life! This program is designed to take care of your body so that it can nurture your baby. Remember to always listen to your body. If you are tired, rest. Your body will never signal you wrong. This is not the time for PRs or trying to reach new fitness goals. This is the moment in life where we are just supporting you, your baby, and your body the best we can.

programs.name: LL 2025 FALL ReCOMP
programs.description:
Welcome to LL Fall 2025 !!! The next 8 weeks will have a big focus on glute development, toned, sexy back & shoulders and of course core and calories deficit if you have a weight loss goal. If you are looking to build muscle with no fat loss we will eat slightly over maintenance. This is a body recomposition program, which exchanges fat for muscle with desired aesthetics. This created the appearance of an hourglass shape and improved metabolism by developing bigger muscles that will speed up energy demand and allow you to enjoy food more.

Nutrition: Everyone get their own meal plan and macro break down. I give a lot of meals in each plan but do NOT feel like you have to make all of these. My advice is to pick 1-2 breakfast/ lunch / dinners and have those for the week. Then the next week rotate a new one in or keep your favorites. Meals are simple and I have swaps. IT IS  CRUCIAL for you to track the first two week. I need this data and to see how your body is responding metabolically. Then I can tweak your plan to really dial in results. If you do not give me the data, I can not help much. If you want to eat your own foods, that is totally fine! Track them and hit your calories goal, then protein goal. The carb and fat % is the least important. Your body will use both as fuel, but DO NOT go over your calories to hit this number. Thermodynamic is a LAW energy in vs out. Stay in calories, then focus on protein, I would get it in early in the day. Playing catch up always leads to hitting cals without hitting protein. 

WEEKLY cardio homework: This is based on weight loss goals. Total time is for the week, you can break this up however you want. 
5-10 lbs WL goal = 90 min cardio weekly (NOT DAILY)
15-20lbs WL goal= 120 min cardio weekly 
25+ lbs WL goal = 3 hours weekly 
low intensity cardio like walking burns the most FAT but not the highest calories. If you do higher intensity you WILL trigger hunger. walking is best

programs.name: LL 3 GYM
programs.description:
Welcome to LL3! This next program will really progress your body to the next level. We will be focusing a lot stability training (proprioception) and incorporating more dynamic movement patterns, along with some higher intensity training.The program will adjust every 2 weeks with new reps/sets and or exercises. 

FITNESS: YOU HAVE EARNED THIS PROGRAM!!! You have made it through LL1 & LL2 and now we will be using all that hard work to really push your body to the next level. This program will really focus on LEAN body composition. We are using more dynamic movements to really challenge those muscles you have spent the past 4 months building! 

NUTRITION: The nutrition will have similar groups with the addition of one. The focus is on fueling our workouts but also really leaning out body composition. IF you are already where you want to be as far as body comp, you will still follow this program but incorporate a few more starches

programs.name: LL BodyREcomp March26
programs.description:
Welcome to LL CUT 1.0/ The first series for summer prep

Focus: The next 8 weeks will be heavily focused on dropping body fat, increasing/ regulating metabolic function, gut health & and deep/ core. 

There are extended notes and instruction in week 1-2 of the program. Please read through and let me know any questions. 

I am so excited you are here and I am committed to you getting into the best summer body you've every had!

programs.name: LL HIIT
programs.description:
Welcome to the Lusciously Lean home HIIT edition. This program is designed to offer 30 mins or less of home high intensity interval training workouts that will increase lean muscle mass, improve performance and cardiovascular health, develop core strength and stamina and challenge your body in conditioning. High intensity workouts like these have been proven to aid in lowering anxiety and improving mental health over time. HIIT workouts increase dopamine and endorphins in the body that flood the brain and improve mood, stress levels and offer an over all improved mood. Ideally these workouts will be coupled with 1-2 days of low intensity workouts such as yoga, walking, or a bike ride. 
The LL HIIT workouts are designed to be done as AMRAP (as many reps/ rounds as possible). You will have 5 workouts each week. You will want to track your rounds completed because you will compete with that the following week.

programs.name: LL HOME Summer Prep
programs.description:
Welcome to 2024 LL Summer Prep!

This 8 week program IS SUMMER FOCUSED! Nutrition will be a key focus, along with short cardio intervals warm ups. Make sure you complete these and PUSH yourself. They are short. bursts but will increase the metabolic burn for the workout and for 24 hours. 

Summer is coming and Hot Girl walks are a real game changer! We will be focusing on miles completed for the week. You can use step trackers, indoor cardio or your phones to track this. My initial goal is 15 mi week. If you are just starting cardio, 5 mi/ week is a great goal. 

Nutrition: It is time to DIAL IT IN! I encourage fasting for HEALTH purposed not weight loss. Fasting for 24 hours helps to reset leptin/ grehlin signals (fullness and hunger ) and shrink your stomach. If you struggle with never feeling full or constant food "noise" this can really help along with magnesium supplements and saffron. Thorne also has a great craving and stress support. If you do not have my client discount in the portal please let me know and I will get you set up to save. 

Tip 1: Pre tack your food for the day. This is very boring and routine but I promise it is the key to successful tracking in the beginning. You do not need to track your green veg, but know that any added butter and oil needs to be tracked. 
Tip2: Keep fresh fruit and veg for snacking if your are hungry. Gum, low calorie or zero calories drinks are a life saver when calories are low! Get some favorites and keep them available!

programs.name: LL I HOME
programs.description:
Lusciously LEAN 

Welcome to your 60 day body composition program! This program is geared to lean you out, while still building and developing those nice curves we all love! 

NUTRITION
The nutrition for this program is a guideline based on the common goal to lower body fat and increase lean mass. Your Nutritional guidelines will be sent via email. 

FITNESS: This is a 60 day body composition program that will support lean mass. Every 2 weeks, there will be a new progression. Some progressions are in exercises, some are in reps/ sets (volume). Please read the notes found in each workout for more information. Make sure to track your weights, reps, and sets so that you can track personal progress.

programs.name: LL II
programs.description:
LUSCIOUSLY LEAN II

WELCOME to Lusciously Lean II !!! If you are here that means you have completed LL1 and are ready to REALLY push your body to the next level.  You should feel proud of everything you accomplished with LL1 and that you are recommitting to these health habits with LL2. This part is usually where you can see your body change as far as definition and muscle development.

FITNESS: This program is designed to help take the strong fitness foundation you built during LL1 and push you to the next level. There are more complex movement patterns and challenging combinations of reps and sets. Each workout have an explanation in the notes to better help explain new movements. 

NUTRITION: The LL2 Nutritional is similar as far as grouping food, but you will notice different meal timing, and also that you get more starch in this program. If you still have a goal of losing more then 20 lbs I would stick to more of the LL1 guide, and only do the additional carbs on leg days.

programs.name: LL II Home
programs.description:
Welcome to Lusciously Lean II Home edition!!

I am so excited to see everyone's results after this program. Some changes added are more "cable movement" that can easily be mimicked with your resistance bands. I wanted to give more gym options though, just incase you wanted to go. Equipment is still kept to a minimum, however for weeks 5-8 you will need some heavier weights for drop sets with lower body. You can get kettlebells or dumb bells, but you only need ONE of each weight. For example 1 20lb, 1 30 lb, 1 40 lb, 1 50 lb. This is so that you can really build the muscle meant to go with this program. 

Cardio Homework 
20+ lbs 3 hours of cardio
10-15 lbs 2 hours of cardio
5 lbs 1 hour cardio homework 
** this is low intensity: you should be able to talk during this cardio but still break a sweat.

programs.name: LL IV
programs.description:
Welcome to Luscisously Lean IV

Congradulations on make it this far!! You have challenged your body, mind and dedication to health. Everyone at this point is a gym pro and should take a moment to really appreciate what you have accomplished. 

Cardio Homework: We have no additional cardio homework in this program. If you still have 10+ lbs of fatloss as a goal, I would encourage 2 additional hours of low intensity cardio. You already have one 60 min low intenisty cardio programmed in. 

Make sure to read the notes. There are some drop sets in this program that are explained. 

Thank you so much for your dedication, support, and trust. I appreciate the opportunity to be part of your healthy life journey so much. 

LETS GOOOOOOO!!!!!!

programs.name: LL JAN-FEB 26
programs.description:
Welcome to Lusciously Lean body REcomp! This year we will be focused on an entire 12 months of progressive body recoup training and nutrition. The series will have 8 week entry points but will progress you through the typical goals and season. We are resetting from the holiday food and pace, prioritizing our health and movement while pushing towards our summer body goal. We are strategic and intentional! 

I customize each persons meal plans/ macros. Most people who do not see changes, are not tracking properly. It is important to collect solid data so that I can coach and edit numbers as needed. A food scale can be very helpful and allow for clear tracking. I meet each client where they are at, so if this is too much for you right now, that is fine just adjust expectations to the efforts you're able to put into it. There is no right or wrong way, just progress. 

Workouts have a gym and home version available. Each home gym is very different so take a peek at the gym day to see what you may have and can tweak your own exercises. Make sure to read the notes, for example your cardio day is NOT 3 hours long, It is 30 min but the circuit counts that at 3 rounds. I promise I am not here to kill you. 

If you every have questions, the FASTED turn around is to text me directly 702-686-5343. I run both businesses from my personal phone and I do not find any text annoying!  messages in the app usually get checked once daily. I am so excited to work with you and my focus will be more on LL this year! If you send any referrals or join with a friend make sure to tell me so you get $20 off enrollment!

programs.name: LL SSD
programs.description:
Welcome to LL summer slim down!

This program is designed to LEAN out body mass with an emphasis on strengthening core and pelvic floor. There are 5 resistance training workouts per week. Each day consists of a 25 min cardio weight circuit , then an additional 25 min focused lifting circuit. The first part is meant to be done quickly and get through as many rounds as you can with very little rest. The second section however is intended to be done with focus and slower and lower rep counts. If you have to skip one or the other due to lack of time, do the first one. 

You will also notice in some of the exercises I refer to " hold your pee" contraction. This is simply put as a Kegel. If you do not know how to Kegel just act like you have to pee and are trying to hold it. This is activating your pelvic floor muscles and will be necessary in targeting that internal girdle. 



.

programs.name: LL SUMMER 2.0 25
programs.description:
Welcome to LL ladies!!! I am so excited to work with you! The next 8 weeks will be focused on building and toning your muscles in a way to create that sexy hourglass look. Your nutrition is 90% of these results. This needs to be a key focus especially if weight loss is your goal. 

Workouts: If you miss a workout you can always click and drag it to the next day. If fat loss is a goal , focus on getting 7k steps or more a day. Studies show that walking for 2 min twice  and hour make you 3x more insulin sensitive (this is good) and has been shown to be more effective than 60 min straight of cardio. 

Fasting: IF you want my beginners fasting guide please message me and I will email that personally to you. Fasting is not starving, it is used to increase metabolic performance and fat burning.

programs.name: LL SUMMER PREP 24
programs.description:
Welcome to 2024 LL Summer Prep!

This 8 week program IS SUMMER FOCUSED! Nutrition will be a key focus, along with short cardio intervals warm ups. Make sure you complete these and PUSH yourself. They are short. bursts but will increase the metabolic burn for the workout and for 24 hours. 

Summer is coming and Hot Girl walks are a real game changer! We will be focusing on miles completed for the week. You can use step trackers, indoor cardio or your phones to track this. My initial goal is 15 mi week. If you are just starting cardio, 5 mi/ week is a great goal.

Tip 1: Pre tack your food for the day. This is very boring and routine but I promise it is the key to successful tracking in the beginning. You do not need to track your green veg, but know that any added butter and oil needs to be tracked. 
Tip2: Keep fresh fruit and veg for snacking if your are hungry. Gum, low calorie or zero calories drinks are a life saver when calories are low! Get some favorites and keep them available!

programs.name: LL SUMMER SERIES
programs.description:
Welcome to the LL SUMMER SERIES!!! I am including the beginners fasting guide if you are interested please message me in this app and I will email you the doc. 

Nutrition is (as always) a big focus. Since we have more sunlight, you have plenty of instructions from the son to eat lot of yummy plants! When the sun is scarce (winter) plants are also scarce (see the pattern)? Summer we want to eat light and fresh and colorful! Mediterranean / paleo diets are the vibe and if you have fat loss as a goal this is low cal/ high fiber so its much easier to lose during the summer. ALSO, VITAMIN D  helps to regulate hunger, the sunshine gives you dopamine which means emotional triggering for food should be less, and sunshine gives the mitochondria in your body the instructions on how to MAX the burn!

programs.name: LL VI home
programs.description: Welcome to the next home progression of LL. This program will challenge your body in strength and conditions. This can be challenging at home with little access to heavy weights or machines. This is where your bands will come into play. Tricks to add resistance to bands are by double looping them, tying a knot in them. or getting bands with a higher resistance level. You can also tie the bands or loop them around dumb bells to add double resistance. Either way you choose, the idea is to increase resistance, and lower the volume.

programs.name: LL Winter Arc 2025
programs.description:
Welcome to LL winter arc!!! You are taking the last 8 weeks of the year and maximizing your physical, mental and emotional health! This time of year is full of stress, excuses and seasonal depression. Taking care of yourself allows for you to be a better version for everyone else.

NUTRITION IS 90% OF RESULTS!!!!! please do not sell yourself short by ignoring you nutrition. You still have room for treats!!!! Track for a week or two and get your rhythm. Pick 1-2 recipes for each meal and repeat. This is the easiest way to be successful. It does not matter if Friday you have a few drinks outside of the meal plan!!! 80/20 rule and you will still see great results.

programs.name: LL1
programs.description:
Lusciously LEAN 

Welcome to your 60 day body composition program! This program is geared to lean you out, while still building and developing those nice curves we all love! 

NUTRITION
The nutrition for this program is a guideline based on the common goal to lower body fat and increase lean mass. Your Nutritional guidelines will be sent via email. 

FITNESS: This is a 60 day body composition program that will support lean mass. Every 2 weeks, there will be a new progression. Some progressions are in exercises, some are in reps/ sets (volume). programs.description:

FITNESS: YOU HAVE EARNED THIS PROGRAM!!! You have made it through LL1 & LL2 and now we will be using all that hard work to really push your body to the next level. This program will really focus on LEAN body composition. We are using more dynamic movements to really challenge those muscles you have spent the past 4 months building! 

NUTRITION: The nutrition will have similar groups with the addition of one. The focus is on fueling our workouts but also really leaning out body composition. IF you are already where you want to be as far as body comp, you will still follow this program but incorporate a few more starches.

programs.name: LL4 HOME
programs.description:
Welcome to Lusciously Lean IV HOME EDITION

The next 60 days will take your fitness and results to the next level. We are focusing a little more on compound movement patterns. This helps to build core, stability and proprioception. If there are any exercises that feel awkward or uncomfortable, check your form but also give your body time to learn. It will adapt as it has with all the other hard work you have done. 

We are also going to be hitting each body part more times per week. Make sure you are prioritizing your sleep and supplementation so that we can maximize recovery. 

Cardio homework: Your cardio homework for the next 60 days is 3 total hours/ week. You can break this up as needed.

programs.name: Lusciously Lean BODYreCOMP 1.0
programs.description:
Welcome to Lusciously Lean the ultimate BODYreCOMP program! I am so excited to have you here and appreciate you trusting me with your health and fitness goals. This program is designed to take your body to the next level with lean, sexy curves. We will have a BIG focus on nutrition this round, providing each person with their own unique, personalized nutrition program. I know a lot of people do not prefer tracking, but please take the first two weeks to be as accurate as possible. This provides me with data that helps me analyze your metabolic function and rate and make necessary tweaks. You can feel free to swap out any recipes or meal you do not like with another option. 

Your workouts with be set up M-F but feel free to click and drag the days and workouts as needed. Make sure to track your weights and reps and complete the workouts. The app tracks all progress and it helps ensure you are progressing properly. You will only see 2 weeks of workouts at a time, this is to make sure no one jumps ahead.

CARDIO HOMEWORK: This piece is personalized based on your weight loss goal. The cardio is broken down into weekly hours. This cardio can be broken up however you need to fit your schedule. ALL CARDIO is low intensity. This means you are able to carry on a conversation without gasping for air , but still sweating. You could walk at an incline 5%, or walk outside, do stairs at a reasonable pace, bike, elliptical, again your choice. This cardio homework is IN ADDITION to your workouts in the program. You can break this up through out the day, it does not need to be all at once. I can also set up a step goal for you if your prefer that. Just message me and I will add it. You can sync Fitbit or apple watches to track here. 
GROUPS:
5-10 lbs - 3 hours/ week
15-20 lbs - 4 hours/week
20+ lbs - 5 hours/week

You will see a GYM & HOME version for each day. You can pick which one you will do, you do not need to do both. Just one.

programs.name: Lusciously Lean BODYreCOMP 2.0
programs.description:
Welcome to Lusciously Lean the ultimate BODYreCOMP 2.0 program! I am so excited to have you here and appreciate you trusting me with your health and fitness goals. This program is designed to take your body to the next level with lean, sexy curves. We will have a BIG focus on nutrition this round, providing each person with their own unique, personalized nutrition program. I know a lot of people do not prefer tracking, but please take the first two weeks to be as accurate as possible. You can sync Fitbit or apple watches to track here. 
GROUPS:
5-10 lbs - 3 hours/ week
15-20 lbs - 4 hours/week
20+ lbs - 5 hours/week

You will see a GYM & HOME version for each day. You can pick which one you will do, you do not need to do both. Just one.

programs.name: NEW LL 2024
programs.description:
Welcome to the NEW LL program and your SEXIEST SUMMER YET! I am so excited to see everyone's results! This round will have major focus on CORE: pelvic floor health & stability, pelvic floor & glute relationship and strength, along with sexy tones tummies. 

Weight loss goals: If you have a body fat loss goal we need to keep you eating in a deficit. Macro counting can be overwhelming, so I initially recommend a calorie and protein goal. If you do not see any weight loss after 2 week, message me and we will adjust numbers. It take HOURS to work off 500+ calories and only minutes to consume it. I am here to support you and the nutritional guides & tracking are your tools. 

CARDIO HOMEWORK: Cardio does not need to consume your gym time or add hours to it. I want you focus on getting more steps in the day, park farther, get up and walk around every hour for 5 min, etc. This will add up. 
5-10lbs fat loss goal 90 min cardio weekly 
10-15lbs fat loss goal 3 hours cardio weekly (you can split this up however you please)
20-30lbs fat loss goal 5 hours cardio weekly 

You do not need to run, low intensity walks, bike rides, hikes, stairs are all great.

WORKOUTS: The workouts will have 2 week micro progressions. You're first two weeks will look similar to week 3-4 but the intensity is increased through sets. Your body needs repetition to see progress along side of small progressive overloading. Week 5-6 will be all new workouts! Week 7-8 will be more intense volume again through the sets.

programs.name: NEW LL HOME 2024
programs.description:
Welcome to the NEW LL program and your SEXIEST SUMMER YET! I am so excited to see everyone's results! This round will have major focus on CORE: pelvic floor health & stability, pelvic floor & glute relationship and strength, along with sexy tones tummies. 

Weight loss goals: If you have a body fat loss goal we need to keep you eating in a deficit. Macro counting can be overwhelming, so I initially recommend a calorie and protein goal. Your body needs repetition to see progress along side of small progressive overloading. Week 5-6 will be all new workouts! Week 7-8 will be more intense volume again through the sets.

programs.name: Nutrition Bootcamp
programs.description:
Welcome to the Nutrition Bootcamp 

Welcome to the beginning of your nutritional boot camp. I am so excited to share and learn together in an environment focused on mental and physical health. During this boot camp, we will dive into the science behind how our bodies work, how foods translate; as well as, the purpose they serve and the incredible relationship between our physical existence and nature. These topics will help bring better understanding behind why certain things are deemed “good” or “bad” for you and also break down these labels and see if the science truly supports them. 

Month 1: The Gut 
Month 2: Energy: how to make food your friend.
Month 3: Body: How nutrition & movement go hand in hand.

programs.name: Posture & Core Restore
programs.description:
Welcome to the posture & core restore program! I am so excited to share these exercises and progressions that have made a huge personal difference in my life. As a Mama who nursed all my babies 2 years, my posture & core were suffering. The great thing about this program is it applies to everyone; Male & female, moms, seniors and even teens (we know how much electronics are impacting this generation). 
We will progress through 3 different, 2 week long phases. Your workouts should take you about 20-30 mins. Allow enough time to not rush through the exercises. There will be a few different cues to know for these exercises. 
1. Kegel; this activates the pelvic floor muscles to contract. I want this to be a held contraction. As we progress you will be able to hold these longer. If you do not know how to Kegel, simply try to to stop your flow when using the bathroom. You can also practice these throughout the day to build up faster. 
2. "chin in" or give yourself a double chin. This is the one time a double chin is embraced. It will help keep your cervical vertebrae in alignment. 
3. "Shoulder back and down" . This can be very hard at first. I still struggle and have to mentally cue myself. The best way is to pull shoulders back (push nipple forward) and pull the shoulders down away from ears. This alone can be an exercise to add in daily, especially if you do computer work. set a timer every hour to do 3-5 of these and hold 15-30 sec. 
4. Pull your core IN! This is a vacuum style hold. You will do your best to suck in your stomach and pull that belly button in. This will make breathing shallow so you may need to take a quick break, take some deep breathes & continue. 
Remember, a lot of these exercises and stretches will be ugly and feel impossible. If you did them perfectly you wouldn't need this program. I still do not perform some of these well. Practice! We got this!! (especially stomach vacuums, do not get defeated. They won't look amazing at first.)

programs.name: Small Group Homies 2
programs.description:
You ladies ARE KILLING IT! You all have the highest percentage of completion out of 189 clients. Almost all of you were in the high 90%-100%!! That is HUGE!!

You are moving into a build phase. Your workouts will be geared towards hypertrophy (no not bulky) but it is important to get enough protein during this phase. If anyone has been thinking about adding in collagen, this is the phase to do it. If anyone wants Macros with their plan please message me a with you goal (maintenance, weight loss, weight gain) and also your current weight. I can go into your personal account and do your macros. Again, I don't love macros but as long as you don't become obsessive it can be a useful tool. 

Your HIIT intervals will  be shorter this round. If weight loss is a goal add in an extra 2-3 hours or low intensity cardio (not high intensity).

programs.name: Small Group LL5 homies style
programs.description:
Welcome to your small group ladies!!! I am so excited about this program and being able to take all of your specific goals and personalities and program for them!! Some tips for this round....

Nutritional advice: If I were doing this program I would carb cycle. Which means I would do 2 low carb days, 1 higher carb day (leg day). Make sure you are focusing on protein with meals and making sure to get at least 100g/ day of protein. Remember low carb is 45-65 g carbs and higher/ moderate carbs is 85-100g. I am in no way telling you to count macros,  but I wanted to give you an idea of the ranges for cycling. On higher carb day, fats need to go down a bit or else its just an over consuming day.

programs.name: SSD 2.0
programs.description: Welcome to the continuation of Summer Slim Down! The next 8 weeks will focus on PFM progressions along with HIIT style cardo circuits to burn calories. The nutritional piece is going to be 85-90% of the puzzle so if you here is the reminder you needed if last round nutrition was lacking. If you are choosing to follow your Macros, remember that fruits and veggies should make up the majority of your carb macros.

programs.name: TRX
programs.description:
Welcome to The Science Based Body's home TRX program. This program is designed based on functional movement patterns that challenge proprioception, core stability as well as anaerobic/ aerobic cardiovascular training. 

Equipment required: TRX and a set of DB
